zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Fraser於大約1408年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾費洛斯 豪斯時，她的父親Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorth35歲，母親Elinor Douglas34歲。她於1434年與Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt.在英國蘇格蘭莫雷結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1469年在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾福利斯享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Fraser于大约1408年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾費洛斯 豪斯时，她的父亲Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorth35岁，母亲Elinor Douglas34岁。她于1434年与Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt.在英国苏格兰莫雷结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1469年在苏格兰艾爾金爾福利斯享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Fraser was born about 1408, in Philorth House, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorth, was 35 and her mother, Elinor Douglas, was 34. She married Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. in 1434, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1469, in Forres, Elginshire, Scotland, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Fraser est née environ 1408, à Philorth House, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorth, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elinor Douglas, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. en 1434, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1469, à Forres, Elginshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Fraser um 1408 in Philorth House, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorth 35 und ihre Mutter Elinor Douglas 34. Sie hat 1434 in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1469 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Forres, Elginshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Fraserが約1408年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアフィロルス ホーウゼで生まれた時，父Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorthは35歳，母Elinor Douglasは34歳であった。1434年にイギリススコットランドモーアイでLord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1469年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアフォーレスで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Fraser(이)가 대략 1408년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 필로르스 허스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorth(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elinor Douglas(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1434년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1469년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 포러스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. em 1434, em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Fraser родилась около 1408 г. в местности филорт хоус, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorth было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elinor Douglas, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. в 1434 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1469 г. в местности форресь, элгиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 62 лет.

Se casó con Lord Alexander Cumming of Altyre, Kt. en 1434, en Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
